items.name: Get Page As Markdown
items.description: Retrieve the full content of a Notion page rendered as markdown.

page_id.description: The UUID of the Notion page to fetch.

items.name: Create Page
items.description: Create a new Notion page under a parent page or database.

parent_id.description: The UUID of the parent page or database.

title.description: The title of the new page.

content.description: Optional markdown body for the page.

items.name: Search Workspace
items.description: Search across all pages and databases the integration can access.

query.description: The text to search for across the workspace.

page_size.description: Maximum number of results to return.

items.name: Append Block Children
items.description: Append new block content to the end of an existing Notion page or block.

block_id.description: The UUID of the page or block to append to.

children.description: An array of block objects to append.
